title: neoschmidia pallida
intro: Neoschmidia pallida, also known as the Nees' grass or Nees' grass tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Neoschmidia pallida are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
